title: Raccoon Removal in Throgs Neck, Bronx | $900-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Throgs Neck, Bronx. Licensed experts safely remove raccoons from homes and businesses. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Throgs Neck residents face unique raccoon challenges due to the neighborhood's waterfront location and abundance of mature trees. These intelligent animals often find their way into attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces of the area's diverse housing stock, from single-family homes to waterfront properties. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Throgs Neck, ensuring safe and humane wildlife control.
whyUs: Our team has extensive experience serving Throgs Neck and understands the specific wildlife patterns in this waterfront Bronx community. We provide prompt, professional service with licensed technicians who use humane removal methods and offer complete exclusion solutions to prevent future raccoon intrusions.
localContext: Throgs Neck's proximity to the East River and Long Island Sound, along with parks like Fort Schuyler and the surrounding tree-lined streets, creates ideal habitat for raccoons seeking food and shelter. The area's mix of older single-family homes, newer developments, and waterfront properties all present different access points that raccoons exploit, particularly around Pennyfield Avenue, East Tremont Avenue, and the residential neighborhoods near the Throgs Neck Bridge.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Throgs Neck?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Throgs Neck typically ranges from $900 to $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, accessibility of the location, and necessary repairs. A single raccoon in an accessible attic will cost less than a family of raccoons requiring extensive exclusion work and damage repair.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Throgs Neck?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Throgs Neck due to the neighborhood's waterfront location, abundant trees, and proximity to green spaces like Fort Schuyler. The area's residential properties with attics, chimneys, and decks provide ideal denning sites, especially during breeding season from late winter through spring.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Throgs Neck home?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Throgs Neck raccoon removal calls within 24 hours for emergency situations. The complete removal process can take anywhere from a few days to two weeks, depending on whether babies are present, the number of animals, and the complexity of the exclusion work needed to seal entry points.

faqs.question: Will raccoons damage my Throgs Neck property?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can cause significant damage to Throgs Neck homes by tearing off roof shingles, ripping open soffits and vents, destroying insulation, and contaminating attic spaces with droppings and urine. They may also damage chimneys, tear up lawns searching for grubs, and tip over garbage cans. Professional removal prevents further damage and includes repairs to entry points.
